[Time in Australia](/wiki/Time_in_Australia "Time in Australia")

**UTC+10:30** is an identifier for a [time offset from UTC](/wiki/UTC_offset "UTC offset") of +10:30. This time is used in parts of Australia.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

## As standard time (Southern Hemisphere winter)

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B10:30&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: As standard time (Southern Hemisphere winter)")]

### Oceania

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B10:30&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Oceania")]

* Australia
  + [New South Wales](/wiki/New_South_Wales "New South Wales")
    - [Lord Howe Island](/wiki/Lord_Howe_Island "Lord Howe Island")

## As daylight saving time (Southern Hemisphere summer)

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B10:30&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: As daylight saving time (Southern Hemisphere summer)")]

Principal cities: [Adelaide](/wiki/Adelaide "Adelaide"), [Broken Hill](/wiki/Broken_Hill "Broken Hill")

### Oceania

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B10:30&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Oceania")]

* Australia – [Central Daylight Time](/wiki/Australian_Central_Daylight_Time "Australian Central Daylight Time") (ACDT)
  + [New South Wales](/wiki/New_South_Wales "New South Wales")
    - [Broken Hill](/wiki/Broken_Hill "Broken Hill")
  + [South Australia](/wiki/South_Australia "South Australia")

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B10:30&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: See also")]
